mapper.delete: ALTER TABLE AGG_HOST_IO_STAT_1D DELETE WHERE TIME < #{time}
mapper.select:
SELECT HOST_ID as hostId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
DEV_NAME as devName,
ROUND(avgMerge(RD_LATENCY_AVG),2) as rdLatencyAvg , maxMerge(RD_LATENCY_MAX) as rdLatencyMax, minMerge(RD_LATENCY_MIN) as rdLatencyMin
ROUND(avgMerge(WR_LATENCY_AVG),2) as wrLatencyAvg , maxMerge(WR_LATENCY_MAX) as wrLatencyMax, minMerge(WR_LATENCY_MIN) as wrLatencyMin
FROM AGG_HOST_IO_STAT_1D detail WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND HOST_ID = ${hostId}
AND HOST_ID in (${hostIds})
GROUP BY HOST_ID, DEV_NAME, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr

SELECT HOST_ID as hostId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
DEV_NAME as devName,
ROUND(avgMerge(RD_REQ_PS_AVG),2) as rdReqpsAvg , maxMerge(RD_REQ_PS_MAX) as rdReqpsMax, minMerge(RD_REQ_PS_MIN) as rdReqpsMin
ROUND(avgMerge(WR_REQ_PS_AVG),2) as wrReqpsAvg , maxMerge(WR_REQ_PS_MAX) as wrReqpsMax, minMerge(WR_REQ_PS_MIN) as wrReqpsMin
FROM AGG_HOST_IO_STAT_1D detail WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND HOST_ID = ${hostId}
AND HOST_ID in (${hostIds})
GROUP BY HOST_ID, DEV_NAME, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr

SELECT HOST_ID as hostId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
DEV_NAME as devName,
ROUND(avgMerge(RD_STAT_AVG),2) as rdStatAvg , maxMerge(RD_STAT_MAX) as rdStatMax, minMerge(RD_STAT_MIN) as rdStatMin
ROUND(avgMerge(WR_STAT_AVG),2) as wrStatAvg , maxMerge(WR_STAT_MAX) as wrStatMax, minMerge(WR_STAT_MIN) as rdStatMin
ROUND(avgMerge(UTILIZATION_AVG),2) as utilizationAvg , maxMerge(UTILIZATION_MAX) as utilizationMax, minMerge(UTILIZATION_MIN) as utilizationMin
FROM AGG_HOST_IO_STAT_1D detail WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND HOST_ID = ${hostId}
AND HOST_ID in (${hostIds})
GROUP BY HOST_ID, DEV_NAME, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr

SELECT HOST_ID as hostId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
DEV_NAME as devName, ROUND(sum(IO_STAT_AVG * if((${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME)) > 86400, 86400, ${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME))),2) as ioStatSum FROM (SELECT HOST_ID, DEV_NAME, TIME, avgMerge(IO_STAT_AVG) as IO_STAT_AVG FROM AGG_HOST_IO_STAT_1D detail WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND HOST_ID = ${hostId}
AND HOST_ID in (${hostIds})
GROUP BY HOST_POOL_ID, CLUSTER_ID, HOST_ID, DEV_NAME, TIME) t GROUP BY HOST_ID, DEV_NAME, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr

SELECT HOST_ID as hostId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
any(DEV_NAME) as devName,
ROUND(avgMerge(RD_STAT_AVG),2) as rdStatAvg
ROUND(avgMerge(WR_STAT_AVG),2) as wrStatAvg
ROUND(avgMerge(UTILIZATION_AVG),2) as utilizationAvg
FROM AGG_HOST_IO_STAT_1D detail WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND HOST_ID in (${hostIds})
GROUP BY HOST_ID, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr

SELECT HOST_ID as hostId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
any(DEV_NAME) as devName,
ROUND(avgMerge(RD_LATENCY_AVG),2) as rdLatencyAvg
ROUND(avgMerge(WR_LATENCY_AVG),2) as wrLatencyAvg
FROM AGG_HOST_IO_STAT_1D detail WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND HOST_ID = ${hostId}
AND HOST_ID in (${hostIds})
GROUP BY HOST_ID, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr

SELECT HOST_ID as hostId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
any(DEV_NAME) as devName,
ROUND(avgMerge(RD_REQ_PS_AVG),2) as rdReqpsAvg
ROUND(avgMerge(WR_REQ_PS_AVG),2) as wrReqpsAvg
FROM AGG_HOST_IO_STAT_1D detail WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND HOST_ID = ${hostId}
AND HOST_ID in (${hostIds})
GROUP BY HOST_ID, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr

SELECT HOST_ID as hostId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
any(DEV_NAME) as devName, ROUND(sum(IO_STAT_AVG * if((${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME)) > 86400, 86400, ${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME))),2) as ioStatSum FROM (SELECT HOST_ID, DEV_NAME, TIME, avgMerge(IO_STAT_AVG) as IO_STAT_AVG FROM AGG_HOST_IO_STAT_1D detail WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND HOST_ID = ${hostId}
AND HOST_ID in (${hostIds})
GROUP BY HOST_POOL_ID, CLUSTER_ID, HOST_ID, DEV_NAME, TIME) t GROUP BY HOST_ID, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr
